runTitle: Cloud Run Production Targeted QA - v8.12.100 P25 TOP+BOTTOM dual server query fix
coveredSurfaces: GitLab semver tag release pipeline v8.12.100 completed successfully (pipeline 2581738367, commit 176d4b621bdc1401cff6a6c9393f64d26805d470)
Frontend deploy, AI Engine deploy, post_deploy_smoke, and post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke jobs all succeeded
Vercel production /, /login, and /api/version smoke passed with expected version 8.12.100
Vercel /api/version returned version 8.12.100, releaseTag v8.12.100, commitSha 176d4b621bdc1401cff6a6c9393f64d26805d470, and pipelineUrl 2581738367
Cloud Run ai-engine /health returned status ok, version 8.12.100, configured providers, and routesReady=true
Cloud Run latestReadyRevision ai-engine-00598-pqc receives 100% traffic with cpu=1 and memory=512Mi
P25 production direct supervisor query returned deterministic monitoring-server-health evidence for '가장 위험한 서버와 가장 안정적인 서버를 같이 알려줘'
P25 response included both risky and stable server sections: db-mysql-dc1-primary as most risky and lb-haproxy-dc1-03 as most stable
P25 metadata returned provider=deterministic, modelId=monitoring-server-health, toolsCalled=[monitoring-server-health], evidenceAvailable=true, latency=25ms
skippedSurfaces: Full Playwright UI conversational matrix was not repeated because this targeted run verifies the changed Cloud Run deterministic evidence path directly
Artifact BFF LLM classifier and Vision image upload surfaces were not in scope

expertAssessments.rationale: P25 now resolves as deterministic server health evidence and no longer falls through to evidence-unavailable.
GitLab release pipeline deployed frontend and AI Engine, both post-deploy smoke jobs passed, and Cloud Run stayed within 1 CPU / 512Mi free-tier guardrails.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked via vercel usage after v8.12.100 production deploy; effective=3.2367 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, chargeCount=3045, no unexpected billed usage observed.
Cloud Run ai-engine stayed within free-tier guardrails: cpu=1, memory=512Mi, latestReadyRevision ai-engine-00598-pqc at 100% traffic; /health returned status ok and version 8.12.100.
usageChecks.evidence: gcloud run services describe ai-engine --region asia-northeast1 --format json; curl -s https://ai-engine-jdhrhws7ia-an.a.run.app/health

completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.100 Cloud Run direct supervisor response returned monitoring-server-health deterministic evidence with both 위험 서버 and 안정 서버 sections
